description: A comprehensive full-stack web application designed to help users track their finances with the power of Artificial Intelligence. It offers real-time expense monitoring, automated categorization, and personalized financial advice to help users achieve their savings goals.

functional_features.description: Secure account creation and login using hashed passwords and token-based sessions (JWT).
functional_features.details: Protects user data and ensures private access to personal financial records.

functional_features.description: Detailed CRUD operations for managing all financial transactions.
functional_features.details: Supports categorization (Food, Shopping, Salary, etc.) and automatic date stamping.

functional_features.description: An embedded AI chatbot that understands the user's spending context.
functional_features.details: Uses current balance, budget limits, and category breakdowns to provide actionable savings advice via Groq SDK.

functional_features.description: Automatic prediction of transaction categories based on natural language descriptions.
functional_features.details: Integration with a Python ML script to categorize descriptions like 'Bought Pizza' into 'Food' automatically.

functional_features.description: A high-level overview of financial health using visual charts.
functional_features.details: Displays balance, total income vs. expense bars, and category distribution pie charts using Recharts.

functional_features.description: Set and monitor monthly spending limits.
functional_features.details: System tracks 'Budget vs. Actual' to alert users when they are nearing their financial limits.

functional_features.description: Analytical logic that identifies spending patterns and behaviors.
functional_features.details: Calculates weekend vs. weekday spending ratios and identifies dominant spending categories.

functional_features.description: Predictive modeling for future financial planning.
functional_features.details: Uses Linear Regression to project the next month's total expenses and Z-Score for anomaly detection.

non_functional_features.description: A sleek, dark-mode user interface designed for a high-end feel.
non_functional_features.details: Glassmorphism effects, smooth transitions, and a 'PAISA WA$OOL' branding theme.

non_functional_features.description: Native support for Indian currency and regional financial context.
non_functional_features.details: Uses Indian Rupee (₹) symbols and localized formatting throughout the UI.

non_functional_features.description: Robust protection of sensitive financial data.
non_functional_features.details: Middleware-based route protection, environment variable isolation for API keys, and secure password hashing.

non_functional_features.description: Fast load times and responsive interactions.
non_functional_features.details: Leverages Vite's HMR for frontend and Express's event-driven architecture for the backend.

non_functional_features.description: Clean separation of concerns within the codebase.
non_functional_features.details: Distinct directories for routes, models, middleware, and ML components to facilitate easy maintenance.
